candidates.why: Primary revenue line; matches top-line sales and equals the detailed revenue figures.
Aggregate revenue line duplicating the same totals; kept as fallback per priority rule.

variables.notes: Use Revenue as primary, Total Revenue as fallback per priority selection rule.

candidates.why: Income statement production cost directly associated with revenues; fits COGS definition better than balance sheet Raw Materials.
Inventory component, not a period expense; included only as candidate but not appropriate for COGS.
Operating personnel and salary costs; classic SG&A component (overhead, not COGS).
Broad operating overhead bucket; clearly SG&A-type expenses.
Additional bucket of operating overhead expenses; also SG&A-type.
Explicit administrative overhead; core SG&A component.

variables.notes: No single explicit SG&A total used; multiple overhead components included per guidelines.

candidates.why: Only explicit R&D expense line provided; directly matches XRD definition.
Primary income statement line for interest expense; best match for XINT.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Specific component of interest expense related to lease liabilities; good secondary fallback.
Represents profit attributable to minority shareholders, not interest; should NOT be used for XINT.
Generic interest expense line (appears empty in preview) but semantically correct; tertiary fallback.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental disclosure of lease-related interest; final fallback if others are missing.
Balance sheet liability, not an interest expense; not suitable for XINT.
Balance sheet debt component, not a period expense; not suitable for XINT.
Aggregate short-term debt; not interest expense.
Long-term debt principal; not an interest expense line.
Equity attributable to minorities; unrelated to interest expense.
Same as non-controlling interests; equity, not interest expense.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental

variables.notes: Priority list follows P&L interest lines only; balance sheet debt and minority interest lines excluded as they are not expenses.

candidates.row_label: Change in fair value equity conversion option
candidates.why: Fair value movement on a specific instrument; not total equity.
Equity-accounted profits from associates; not the equity balance.
Represents shareholders’ equity but excludes non-controlling interests; good proxy for book equity.
Component of equity, not total; less suitable than total equity.
Best representation of total book equity including non-controlling interests; aligns with BE definition.
Income statement allocation of profit to minority shareholders; valid for MIB but less direct than balance-sheet equity amount.
Balance sheet line representing equity attributable to minority interests; strong candidate for MIB.
Alternative label for non-controlling interests; clearly denotes minority equity; best primary choice for MIB.
